overview: A premium AI-powered productivity platform combining AI chat, productivity tools, and a clean modern interface in one place.
features: Landing page with hero, search bar, and feature cards
Email login and Internet Identity sign-in with protected routes
ChatGPT-style AI chat with streaming, modes, models, and history
Tools marketplace with 8 functional tools and coming soon cards
Dark and light mode with smooth animations
Responsive sidebar navigation across all pages
